description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:8.1-cli-alpine Docker image for all jobs and caches the vendor/ directory. Define a single test stage and a global before_script that downloads the Composer installer signature, verifies and installs Composer, then runs php composer.phar install. Add a php-8.1 job in the test stage that executes vendor/bin/phpunit. Add a php-8.1-with-coverage job in the test stage that first installs pcre-dev and PHP build dependencies via apk, installs xdebug-3.1.0 with pecl, enables the extension, and then runs vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never. No artifacts or special rules are defined.
